description_long: This is a modern, mid-sized caravan with a streamlined, boxy profile and a predominantly light gray exterior accented by darker gray graphics. The side panels feature several windows of varying sizes, a main entry door, and utility access panels, while the front displays a large windshield and side mirrors typical of a motorhome. The roof is equipped with multiple solar panels, vents, and a skylight, indicating a focus on off-grid capability and interior ventilation. The rear of the caravan is flat, with tail lights and subtle detailing, and the undercarriage houses a single axle with two wheels on each side. The overall design suggests a comfortable, mobile living space suitable for urban and suburban environments. The materials appear to be primarily metal and glass, with plastic and rubber components for trim, windows, and wheels.
description: A sleek, light gray caravan with multiple windows, roof-mounted solar panels, and a single axle, designed for mobile living in urban settings.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the flat back, tail lights, and subtle detailing, with the roof features partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the main entry door, several windows, utility panels, and the single axle with two wheels.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the large windshield, side mirrors, and the over-cab section with roof features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, utility panels, and the same wheel configuration as the other side.
